hooks.command: [ -d node_modules ] || { echo 'Fresh clone: running npm ci (~1-2 min)...'; npm ci --no-audit --no-fund >/tmp/npm-ci.log 2>&1 && echo 'npm ci OK - dependencies installed, dev server and tests are runnable.' || { echo 'npm ci FAILED - last lines of /tmp/npm-ci.log:'; tail -30 /tmp/npm-ci.log; }; }
